calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the PJ Department for Court Trial.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, CSR: Lavon Granger, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo.
Thomas Wright, Esq. for Plaintiff: Vincent Kircher.
Dean Bornes also present in pro per.
The parties have enter into a written stipulation for entry of judgment.
Parties agreed and signed stipulated judgment in open court.
Court deemed matter settled and ordered off calendar.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearling this day for Settlement Conference.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Thomas P. Wright attorney for Plaintiff. Bruce Sandifer, Property Manager.
Defendant: Dean W. Barnes, in pro per.
Case did not settle, trial date confirmed.
